name: Sticky Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk and butter to 120 to 130 degrees.
2. Mix together 2 cups flour, sugar, salt, yeast, and eggs. Add liquid and beat medium for four minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining flour. Cover and let rise until doubled (30 to 45 minutes).
4. Grease 24 muffin cups generously. Chop nuts.
5. Heat all topping ingredients on low until ingredients are melted and combined.
6. Divide topping between muffin cups.
7. Stir into batter. Drop batter into muffin cups.
8. Cover and let rise until doubled (20 to 30 minutes).
9. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
10. Place tins on a cookie sheet and bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Cool three minutes before inverting onto waxed paper.
